title: Softer Side
lyrics: When you run and hide away I can't see the flame inside you, baby You're getting too hard to hold I can't see us moving past each other Unless you find inside yourself a Softer side, a softer side When you come and tear us down Acting harder than you think you really are And your words are laced with hate Calm down and relate Because there comes a time that you won't have me here There'll be a time you'll regret All your hating, all of the venom you're spewing now Oh, so baby, come on, yeah And feel me now Baby, come on, yeah And heal me now Show me your softer side, your softer side Don't run and hide away Reach out for me, baby, reach out for me Don't let all the hate envelop you And find your softer side, your softer side This life won't last long If you keep carrying the hate above us The hate below you, I need you to find your softer side Don't you think it's the way you should Relate and debate with everyone Not have this hate that you think you've not Been the only one wronged in this enemy Don't you want to be better now I want you to just understand You can pull the hate away, baby You can touch my softer side Oh, it all goes down There's no compassion leading us now I wish you could have loved me well I wish you could have touched me a little softer And felt that love there above us Baby, now, now you go back Don't run and hide as I cry our life away With these tears and only your hate brings Oh, I wish you would put down your mask Your heart so soft and make this thing last Cause our love deserves it Yeah, that softer side The love side, the love side The fun that helps us through our suffering It's like your love is buffering in my zone I wish you would have known The softer side, the softer side I can't ever think about that again I lost the will to call you my friend

lyricsSegments.text: When you run and hide away I can't see the flame inside you, baby
You're getting too hard to hold
I can't see us moving past each other Unless you find inside yourself a
Softer side, a softer side
When you come and tear us down Acting harder than you think you really are
And your words are laced with hate Calm down and relate
Because there comes a time that you won't have me here
There'll be a time you'll regret All your hating, all of the venom you're spewing now
Oh, so baby, come on, yeah And feel me now
Baby, come on, yeah And heal me now
Show me your softer side, your softer side
Don't run and hide away Reach out for me, baby, reach out for me
Don't let all the hate envelop you And find your softer side, your softer side
This life won't last long If you keep carrying the hate above us
The hate below you, I need you to find your softer side
Don't you think it's the way you should Relate and debate with everyone
Not have this hate that you think you've not Been the only one wronged in this enemy
Don't you want to be better now I want you to just understand
You can pull the hate away, baby You can touch my softer side
Oh, it all goes down There's no compassion leading us now
I wish you could have loved me well I wish you could have touched me a little softer
And felt that love there above us Baby, now, now you go back
Don't run and hide as I cry our life away With these tears and only your hate brings
Oh, I wish you would put down your mask Your heart so soft and make this thing last
Cause our love deserves it Yeah, that softer side
The love side, the love side The fun that helps us through our suffering
It's like your love is buffering in my zone I wish you would have known
The softer side, the softer side
I can't ever think about that again I lost the will to call you my friend
